prestazioni: Forced induction conversion using a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) paired with a Tomei M82 cast manifold, specifically designed for the **L15B 1.5L DOHC VTEC Turbo** engine (150-170ps stock). Upgraded fuel system includes a Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pump, Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors, and a Hondata KPro4 standalone ECU with custom ethanol-compatible maps for E30-E50 blends. Intercooler setup features a PWR 3.5" core front-mount intercooler with custom 2.5" silicone piping and a HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve.

Full drivetrain reinforcement for the **Honda Real Time AWD (DPS-F)** system, including a Cusco 2-way limited-slip differential (250Nm torque capacity) for the rear axle, upgraded CV joints from Driveshaft Shop (Stage 2, 4340 chromoly), and a K-Tuned lightweight aluminum flywheel (8.5kg) paired with an Exedy Hyper Twin clutch (Stage 2, 440ft-lb torque rating). Suspension overhaul includes Tein Flex Z coilovers (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear) with adjustable camber plates, Whiteline 22mm rear sway bar, and Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings (full set) for the **GF3/GF4 chassis**.

Exhaust system built by Fujitsubo (Japan) with a 3" titanium cat-back system (GSpec II) featuring a 50mm dual-core muffler and a custom 4-2-1 header (SUS304 stainless steel) with a 100-cell GReddy catalytic converter. Engine internals upgraded with JE FSR forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a Tomei Type-S camshaft set (264° intake, 256° exhaust, 11.2mm lift) with upgraded valve springs and titanium retainers. Oil cooling system includes a Setrab 13-row oil cooler with AN-10 fittings and a Moroso high-capacity oil pan (6.5L capacity).
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-Stepwgn widebody conversion kit (GF4-specific, 50mm front/40mm rear fender flares) with custom carbon fiber overfenders and a 3M Gloss Black wrap with red pinstriping. Front bumper replaced with a custom 3D-printed ABS unit featuring integrated DRLs (Philips Ultinon Pro9000 LED) and a Seibon carbon fiber hood (Type 2, 50% weight reduction). Side skirts and rear bumper modified with Rocket Bunny-style extended rocker panels and a custom diffuser with dual 3.5" titanium exhaust tips (Fujitsubo).

OEM+ JDM-spec lighting upgrades including custom HID projector headlights (Morimoto XB35, 5500K) with sequential turn signals, Depo Racing LED taillights (Smoked lens, sequential startup animation), and a custom roof-mounted LED light bar (Lux Lighting, 18" CREE XHP70.2). Wheels are Work Emotion CR Kiwami (18x9.5 +35 front, 18x10.5 +38 rear) with Toyo R888R tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear) and custom titanium wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear).

Interior stripped and rebuilt with a full Bride Ergo II seat setup (front row, fixed-back, Alcantara/black leather) paired with Takata Drift III 4-point harnesses. Custom roll cage by AutoPower (6-point, mild steel, bolt-in) with integrated harness bar and a Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede) on a NRG quick-release hub. Dashboard modified with a custom carbon fiber overlay (Seibon), a 12.3" digital gauge cluster (AEM CD-7), and a HKS Turbo Timer Pro. Rear seats removed and replaced with a custom aluminum storage system for tools/parts, featuring a built-in air compressor (VIAIR 400P) and a carbon fiber trunk floor panel.
